questions.question: Describe the key differences between freehand sketching and digital sketching, and explain which method is more suitable for different stages of the design process.
questions.hint: Consider the advantages and disadvantages of each method

questions.question: A user persona is a document that provides information about a target audience. Sketch a simple user persona card, including the following details: name, age range, goals, pain points, and preferred communication channels.
questions.hint: Use simple shapes and symbols to represent the persona's characteristics

questions.question: Sketch a wireframe of a mobile app that allows users to order food online. Consider the layout, navigation, and key features, but do not include any visual design elements.
questions.hint: Focus on the functional layout and user flow
